title: qbfsat: Add `-assume-negative-polarity` option.
body:
This PR adds the `-assume-negative-polarity` option.  This option, when combined with `-assume-outputs`, means that we should assume the conjunction of the *negation* of each one-bit module output.

This is especially useful when working with miters created by `miter -equiv`, which generate `trigger` signals that should always be low.
